name: Brian AI Dock V2 + Persistent Personal Font
changes: Removes the legacy floating Brian AI interface and all previous composer repair injections
Creates a new isolated Brian AI Dock V2 inside Shadow DOM so application CSS cannot collapse its composer
Adds a fully horizontal composer, attachments, voice dictation, page context and provider diagnostics
Copies the existing personal font from the project to a stable public URL so it loads on every browser and device
Applies the deployed personal font consistently across the application while protecting icon fonts
